Petition For Authority To Advance Estate Funds For Moving And Relocation Expenses Of Beneficiaries Residing In Settlor'S Reald Property As Offset Of Their Respective Beneficial Interests
Off Calendar Apr-10-2013 Advanced From Jun-24-13 To May-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

For Authority To Sell The Settlor'S Real Property For Approval Of Exclusive Listing Agreement, And For Authority To Pay For Repairs/Cosmetic Improvements To Prepare Real Prop. For Sale
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Authority To Advance Estate Funds For Moving And Relocation Expenses Of Beneficiaries Residing In Settlor'S Reald Property As Offset Of Their Respective Beneficial Interests
Off Calendar May-15-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for and with Christine Witherspoon. Ann Cornette York Cole (Beneficiary) in Propria Persona. Carla Robinson (Friend of Cornette) also present.

Ms. Cole stated that she was unable to obtain an Attorney. Ms. Ng stated that they are asking the Court to raise the monthly allowance from $1,000.00 to $2,000.00. The Court advised Ms. Ng that she will have to file a petition to modify the Trust requesting the above. After meeting and conferring, the Parties agreed to the following: 1) The sum of $5,000.00 which is to be used for moving and relocation expenses will be paid to Ms. Cole today by 5:00 p.m. 2) If Ms. Cole fails to completely vacate the premises by June 14, 2013, the remaining $5,000.00 balance will be forfeited. 3) Ms. Cole will be not be disturbed from May 13, 2013 through June 1, 2013. Starting June 1, 2013 and thereafter, the Trustee will have access to the enter the premises from 8:00 a.m. to 5:00 p.m. to get the property ready for sale. Ms. Cole stated that she understands and agrees to the terms as stated. The Petition for Authority to Advance Estate Funds for Moving and Relocation Expenses, etc. and the Petition for Authority to Sell the Real Property were approved (subject to review of the orders). Ms. Ng is to submit a proposed order including the above terms.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Anasse.

For Authority To Sell The Settlor'S Real Property For Approval Of Exclusive Listing Agreement, And For Authority To Pay For Repairs/Cosmetic Improvements To Prepare Real Prop. For Sale
Off Calendar May-06-2013 Continued To May-13-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Cornette York Cole (Beneficiary/Daughter) in Propria Persona. Carla Robinson (Friend of Ann) also present. Lillian Ng for Christine Witherspoon.

Ms. Robinson informed the Court that she has tried to assist Ms. Cole in obtaining an attorney but Ms. Cole does not have enough funds to sign the retainers. Furthermore, Ms. Robinson has learned that the State Bar has pro bono attorneys and stated that they are now involved in that process. The Petition for Authority to Sell Real Property, ect. was continued to May 13, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to join the Petition to Advance Funds.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Nancy Bautista/Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy M. Benton.Ann

For Authority To Sell The Settlor'S Real Property For Approval Of Exclusive Listing Agreement, And For Authority To Pay For Repairs/Cosmetic Improvements To Prepare Real Prop. For Sale

This was a pre-granted matter. The Court informed Ms. Cole that her objections/position need to be in writing and filed by May 2, 2013. The Petition for Authority to Sell The Settlor's Real Property, etc. was continued to May 6, 2013 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy R. Harris.

PETITION FOR INSTRUCTIONS
Off Calendar Nov-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Lillian Ng for Christine Witherspoon.

The Court expressed its concern with regard to the transfer and the 1994 Trust. Ms. Ng stated that she had spoken with Allen from the Title Company and that she was instructed to do a certification with a Court order because there needs to be some type of last "act". In addition, Ms. Ng addressed the proposed order noting that the certification contains all the recitations but that it did not include the legal description. The Court addressed the need for a chain of title. Ms. Ng stated that the certification does include the language with regard to the chain of title. The Court granted the petition, subject to review of the order. The Court requested that Ms. Ng email the amended order to the probate examiner.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Not Reported. Bailiff: Deputy Benton.
